title: Qinisekisa ukubakho kwakho
Confirm your attendance

tea_BantuA_en2nystsnswxhzu_2021q3.md
description: Impendulo yakho isinceda ukuba silungiselele zonke iinkcukacha zombhiyozo.
Your reply helps us organize every detail of the celebration.
namePlaceholder: Faka igama lakho lokuqala kunye nefani
Enter your first and last name
allergiesHint: Only indicate food allergies and intolerances.
privacyConsent: I have been informed and I accept the <link>Privacy Policy</link>
healthConsent: Ndiyavuma ukucutshungulwa kwedatha yam yezempilo (i-allergies kunye nokunganyamezeli) ukulungisa imenyu yomtshato
I consent to the processing of my health data (allergies and intolerances) to adapt the wedding menu
alreadySubmitted: You have already confirmed your attendance
ageUnder14Warning: You are under 14 years of age.
parentalConsent: Abazali bam okanye abagcini bam bayavuma ukuba ndithathe inxaxheba
My parents or guardians consent to my participation

nameRequired: Faka igama lakho ukuze uqinisekise ukubakho.
Enter your name to confirm attendance.
privacyRequired: You must accept the Privacy Policy.
ageUnder14: You are under 14 years of age.
healthConsentRequired: Kufuneka uvume ukusetyenzwa kwedatha yakho yezempilo.
You must consent to the processing of your health data.
menuHeadcountRequired: Indicate at least one menu option.
guestNamesRequired: Enter the names of your companions.
guestNamesExceed: You cannot enter more names than companions.
headcountExceed: Isimbuku seenketho zemenyu azinakuba ngaphezulu kwenani labalingane.
The sum of menu options cannot exceed the number of companions.

saveError: We could not save your response.
withdrawConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukuyirhoxisa impendulo yakho?
Are you sure you want to withdraw your response?
headcountHint: How many people for each option ({{total}} total)
guestNamesHint: Bhala igama lokuqala kunye nefani yeqabane ngalinye (ubuninzi {{count}})
Write the first and last name of each companion (max {{count}})

notFoundText: We couldn't find an invitation with this link.
emptyText: Yila kwaye wabelane ngesimemo sakho somtshato esilungiselelwe wena.
Create and share your personalized wedding invitation.
emptyDescription: Lawula iinkcukacha zesimemo sakho, wabelane ngekhonkco elikhethekileyo kunye neendwendwe zakho, kwaye ufumane iiRSVP zabo.
Manage your invitation details, share a unique link with your guests, and receive their RSVPs.
mapPreviewAlt: Map preview at the indicated location.

loadingText: We are loading your saved data.
successText: Idatha yakho igciniwe kwaye isimemo siyafumaneka ngoku.
Your data has been saved and the invitation is now available.
godparentsHint: Ukuba ufaka elinye igama, elinye liyafuneka.
If you enter one name, the other is also required.
backgroundText: Layisha ifoto okanye ukhethe imvelaphi yeqweqwe.
Upload a photo or choose a background for the cover.
couplePhotoHint: Photo of the couple for the cover.
audioHint: Layisha ifayile yomsindo oza kuyidlala kwikhava (MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A — max 5 MB).
Upload an audio file to play on the cover (MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A — max 5 MB).
audioUploadSubtitle: MP3, WAV, OGG okanye M4A — max 5 MB
MP3, WAV, OGG or M4A — max 5 MB
audioSizeError: Ifayile ye-Audio yodlula umda we-5 MB.
Audio file exceeds the 5 MB limit.
placePlaceholder: Type the venue name to search...
placeHint: Type the venue and select from the results.
scheduleHint: Bhala ishedyuli, umgca ube mnye ngesiganeko ngasinye.
Write the schedule, one line per event.
dressCodeHint: Select the dress code for the celebration.
accommodationHint: Iihotele, iikhowudi zesaphulelo kunye nokhetho lweendwendwe.
Hotels, discount codes and options for guests.
transportHint: Izinketho zezothutho, iishedyuli zebhasi, indawo yokupaka, njl.
Transport options, bus schedules, parking, etc.
kidsHint: Select the children policy for the celebration.
menuRequiredText: Okufunekayo: i-dessert kwaye ubuncinane imenyu ephambili.
Required: dessert and at least one main menu.
menuTextoPlaceholder: Chaza imenyu: umqalisi, eyona khosi, isimuncumuncu...
Describe the menu: starter, main course, dessert...
menuTextoHint: Describe the menu you have prepared.
storyHint: Isicatshulwa sasimahla malunga nebali lakho lothando.
Free text about your love story.
giftsInfoHint: Bonisa ukuba ukhetha izipho eziinkozo, inombolo ye-akhawunti, njl.
Indicate if you prefer cash gifts, account number, etc.
bankInfoHint: Account number for transfers, if applicable.
privacyConsent: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy
setup.galleryTrimmed: {{max}} of {{selected}} images will be uploaded (gallery limit).

loadingConfig: We are retrieving your saved configuration.

restoreInvalid: The file does not have the expected format.

noResultsFilter: No results found with this filter.

description: Sebenzisa eli candelo ukwenza ikhowudi entsha.
Use this section to generate a new code.
newTokenPlaceholder: Press «Generate» to create a new code
activeToken: Active code (only you can see it).
currentTokenDescription: Ukwenza ikhowudi entsha, faka ikhowudi yofikelelo yangoku.
To generate a new code, enter the current access code.
deleteDataDescription: Ukuba unqwenela ukusebenzisa amalungelo akho okukhusela idatha, unokucima yonke idatha yakho.
If you wish to exercise your data protection rights, you can delete all your data.
deleteInvitation: Cima isimemo sam kunye nayo yonke idatha yam
Delete my invitation and all my data

title: Inkxaso
Support
2c0ebdaae5e241fe4f4a7730879c5e0c
tea_BantuA_en2nystsnswxhzu_2021q3.md
description: Ukuba unayo nayiphi na imiba okanye imibuzo malunga nesimemo, ungaqhagamshelana nomphuhlisi:
If you have any issues or questions about the invitation, you can contact the developer:
rightsDescription: Unokucela ukucinywa okanye ukuthunyelwa kwedatha yakho yobuqu nangaliphi na ixesha ngokwegunya lakho (GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPEDA okanye POPIA).
You can request the deletion or export of your personal data at any time according to your jurisdiction (GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPEDA or POPIA).
rightsHint: Umxhasi wakho we-imeyile uya kuvula itemplate esele izaliswe kwangaphambili.
Your email client will open with a pre-filled template.
ccpaText: Wedingo does not sell personal data.
appDescription: Web application for managing wedding invitations.

title: Imvume yecookies
Cookie consent
2c0ebdaae5e241fe4f4a7730879c5e0c
tea_BantuA_en2nystsnswxhzu_2021q3.md
text: I-Wedingo isebenzisa ukugcinwa kwendawo okuyimfuneko kwisimemo sokusebenza (ukugcina iseshoni yakho kunye nezinto ozikhethayo).
Wedingo uses local storage necessary for the invitation to function (saving your session and preferences).

termsText: By using Wedingo you accept these terms.
legalText: Ngokuthobela imithetho esebenzayo, olu lwazi lulandelayo lunikiwe:
In compliance with applicable laws, the following information is provided:

verifyTokenFirst: Qinisekisa ikhowudi yofikelelo phambi kokuba uyigcine.
Verify the access code before saving.
acceptPrivacyPolicy: Kuya kufuneka wamkele uMgaqo-nkqubo waBucala ukwenza isimemo.
You must accept the Privacy Policy to create the invitation.
usernameRequired: Ngenisa igama lomsebenzisi ukuze ukwazi ukungena kamva.
Enter a username so you can log in later.
usernameInvalid: Igama lomsebenzisi linokuqulatha kuphela oonobumba kunye namanani.
Username can only contain letters and numbers.
dayInvalid: Usuku kufuneka lube phakathi kwe-1 kunye ne-31.
hourInvalid: Iyure kufuneka ibe phakathi kwe-0 kunye ne-23.
minuteInvalid: Imizuzu kufuneka ibe phakathi kwe-00 kunye ne-59.
dateNotValid: The date entered is not valid (e.g. February 30 does not exist).
dateBeforeToday: The wedding date cannot be before today.
yearTooFar: The year cannot be later than {{year}}.
sectionOrderInvalid: The section order is not valid.
hiddenSectionsInvalid: The hidden sections are not valid.
godparentsRequired: Ukuba ufaka i-godparent enye, amagama omabini ayafuneka.
If you enter one godparent, both names are required.
coverFirst: The cover must be the first section.
menuRequired: Chaza ubuncinane imenyu ephambili (inyama, intlanzi okanye i-vegan).
Describe at least one main menu (meat, fish or vegan).
ibanInvalid: The IBAN format is not valid.
galleryFormatInvalid: The gallery image format is not valid.
sectionOrderMismatch: The section order has {{actual}} items, but {{expected}} were expected.
messageTooLong: The invitation message cannot exceed 500 characters.
giftsTooLong: The gift information cannot exceed 2000 characters.
transportTooLong: The transport information cannot exceed 2000 characters.
invalidLink: The invitation link is not valid.
accommodationTooLong: Ulwazi ngendawo yokuhlala alunakudlula amagama angama-2000.
readImageFailed: Could not read the image file.
imageTooLarge: The image is too large even after compression.

superadmin.expiredInvitations: {{count}} invitation(s) over 12 months past the wedding date
expiredText: Ngokomgaqo-nkqubo wabucala, le datha bekufanele ukuba icinywe ngokuzenzekelayo.
According to the privacy policy, this data should have been automatically deleted.
noResultsFilter: No invitations found with that criteria.
firebaseAccount: Ukulawula iakhawunti yakho ye-superadmin, sebenzisa i-Firebase console:
To manage your superadmin account, use the Firebase console:

deletedOne: Isimemo {{token}} icinyiwe nayo yonke idatha yayo.
Invitation {{token}} deleted with all its data.

title: Ingxelo yemisebenzi yokucubungula (Ubugcisa be-30 GDPR)
Record of processing activities (Art. 30 GDPR)
2c0ebdaae5e241fe4f4a7730879c5e0c
tea_BantuA_en2nystsnswxhzu_2021q3.md
updated: Ihlaziywe: Julayi 2026. Le rekhodi ibhala imisebenzi yokucwangcisa idatha yobuqu eWedingo.
Updated: July 2026. This record documents personal data processing activities in Wedingo.
row1Data: Amagama amaqabane, umhla, indawo, umxholo, iifoto, umculo, imenyu, amacandelo
Couple names, date, venue, theme, photos, music, menu, sections
row1Purpose: Yila kwaye wenze isimemo somtshato buqu
row2Data: Igama leendwendwe, ukubakho (ewe/hayi), ukhetho lwemenyu, ukungezwani komzimba, idatha yezempilo
Guest name, attendance (yes/no), menu selection, allergies, health data
row4Purpose: Control access to the admin panel
row5Data: Izenzo ze-Superadmin, iithokheni ezisetyenzisiweyo, izimemo ezicinyiweyo
Superadmin actions, used tokens, deleted invitations
internationalText: Idatha igcinwe kwiiseva zeLifu likaGoogle kwingingqi ye-eur3 (eFrankfurt, eJamani).
Data is stored on Google Cloud servers in the eur3 region (Frankfurt, Germany).
scc: Imihlathi yeKhontrakthi esemgangathweni (i-SCC) - Ukuphunyezwa kweSigqibo sowama-2021/914
dpf: Isakhelo soBucala beDatha (DPF) EU-US, UK-US kunye neSwitzerland-US
Data Privacy Framework (DPF) EU-US, UK-US and Switzerland-US
measureEncryption: I-AES-256-GCM uguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo lwemifanekiso kunye nedatha ebuthathaka (PBKDF2)
AES-256-GCM encryption of images and sensitive data (PBKDF2)
measureTls: HTTPS connection (TLS 1.3) across the entire platform
measureFirestore: Imithetho yokhuseleko yeFirestore (ulawulo olusekwe kwiseshoni yokufikelela)
measureStorage: Minimal local storage with consent only
measureRetention: Umgaqo-nkqubo wokugcinwa: iinyanga ezili-12 emva komcimbi wedatha yeendwendwe
Retention policy: 12 months post-event for guest data
measureSuperadmin: I-Superadmin ikhuselwe ngoQinisekiso lwe-Firebase + indlela efihliweyo
Superadmin protected by Firebase Authentication + hidden route

invitationText: Sijonge phambili ekubhiyozeleni eli xesha likhethekileyo kunye nawe.
We look forward to celebrating this special moment with you.

golden: Elegant and bright, with golden accents.
forest: Indalo kunye ne-sober kunye nemifuno ethambileyo.
Natural and sober with soft greens.
rose: Ukufudumala kunye nobuthathaka, kunye ne-pink hues.
Warm and delicate, with pink hues.
linen-soft: Ukukhanya kunye nokungathathi hlangothi, kunye nobukho be-serene kunye nokungabikho kwexesha.
Light and neutral, with a serene and timeless presence.
blush-pearl: Ithambile kwaye inothando, kunye neethoni ezipinki zeperile.
Soft and romantic, with pearly pink tones.
lavender-mist: Intsha kwaye izolile, inelavender kunye ne-mauve hues.
Fresh and serene, with lavender and mauve hues.
champagne-bubble: Iqaqambile kunye nefestive, kunye nekhazimle zegolide ezifudumeleyo.
Bright and festive, with warm golden sparkles.
amber-night: Mnyama kwaye unobuhle, kunye ne-amber kunye negolide ephezulu.
Dark and elegant, with amber and gold highlights.
onyx-gold: Ubunzulu kunye nobunzulu, kunye negolide enzulu kwimvelaphi emnyama.
Deep and sophisticated, with intense gold on dark background.
midnight-royal: Ibhlowu emnyama kakhulu enegolide enzulu kunye nobukho obundilisekileyo.
Very dark blue with intense gold and solemn presence.
burgundy-velvet: Ukufudumala kunye nokugubungela, kunye newayini ebomvu kunye negolide.
Warm and enveloping, with red wine and golden sparkles.
sapphire-night: Ibhlowu enzulu kunye nee-accents zesilivere kunye nobukho obuzolileyo.
Deep blue with silver accents and serene presence.
emerald-grove: Ubunzulu bendalo obuluhlaza kunye nemibala yegolide kunye nenhle.
Deep natural green with golden and elegant hues.
plum-twilight: Ubumfusa obunzulu obupinki kunye neentlantsi zothando.
Intense purple with pink and romantic sparkles.
rainbow: Celebration of diverse love with rainbow colors.
trans: Blue, pink and white in tribute to the trans flag.
nonbinary: Mthubi, omhlophe, omfusa kunye nomnyama kwiflegi engeyiyo ye-binary.
Yellow, white, purple and black for the non-binary flag.
lesbian: I-Orenji, emhlophe kunye nepinki yeflegi yabasetyhini.
Orange, white and pink of the lesbian flag.
bi: Ipinki, imfusa kunye nebhlowu yeflegi ye-bi.
Pink, purple and blue of the bi flag.
pan: Ipinki, tyheli kunye nebhlowu yeflegi yepani.
Pink, yellow and blue of the pan flag.
ace: Imnyama, ingwevu, imhlophe kunye nemfusa yeflegi ye-asexual.
Black, gray, white and purple of the asexual flag.
